CustomField.description: Rich, in-depth details for this item — full text the AI agent can read to answer visitor questions. For a Resume item this is the complete resume (experience, skills, education, certifications); for other items (Project, Blog, YouTube, etc.) use it for any longer-form context, highlights, or supporting detail. Read by the agent through the ResumeDetailsProvider Apex action.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Rich, in-depth text the AI agent reads to answer visitor questions. For a Resume item, paste the full resume; for others, add longer-form context.
CustomField.label: Details
